name: Suppose a Kid from the Last Dungeon Boonies Moved to a Starter Town?
original_name: たとえばラストダンジョン前の村の少年が序盤の街で暮らすような物語
overview: Lloyd is a novice adventurer whose dream is to discover “true strength” in the capital he’s always admired, despite growing up with neighbors who always considered him weak. The story starts with him departing from his hometown, which just so happens to be located right next to…one of the most dangerous dungeons in the world?!

trailers.title: Suppose a Kid from the Last Dungeon Boonies moved to a starter town? Official Trailer
